name: Sway
shortDescription: Sway objects like grass in wind with configurable amplitude, frequency, and phase.

eventsBasedBehaviors.description: Sway multiple instances of an object at different times - useful for random grass swaying.
eventsBasedBehaviors.name: Sway

eventsFunctions.name: ChangeSwayAngle
eventsFunctions.fullName: Set sway angle left and right
eventsFunctions.description: Set sway angle left and right.

eventsFunctions.name: ChangeSwayYScale
eventsFunctions.fullName: Set sway Y scale mininum and maximum
eventsFunctions.description: Set sway Y scale mininum and maximum.

eventsFunctions.name: ChangeSwayYScaleTime
eventsFunctions.fullName: Set sway Y scale time range

description:
This extension makes objects sway at different times.

It can be used to:
- Simulate grass and plant movement swaying in the wind
- Animate seaweed in an underwater environment
- Give flames a flickering look 

Set *Center* and *Origin* points to the center base of the object for best results.

Check out [this demo](https://gd.games/bubble/swayexamples) to see what this extension can do.
